Located within a well-maintained gated community comprising 450 flats, the property provides a blend of comfort and convenience.The flat is currently unfurnished, allowing you to personalize the space to your taste. It features two bedrooms, one of which has an attached western-style bathroom, while the second bathroom is common and also designed in a western style with geysers. The flat includes two balconiesone attached to a bedroom and another in the living areaoverlooking the road, providing a pleasant outdoor space and ample natural light.The living area is spacious, complemented by a normal kitchen and an attached utility area. The flooring throughout the flat is vitrified, offering both durability and ease of maintenance. Additionally, the flat includes a well-maintained individual garden of 350 sq. ft., perfect for relaxation and enjoying fresh air.Facilities The gated community provides a range of amenities, including open parking, 24-hour water supply from both borewell and corporation sources, and 100 power backup. Public transport, including buses and autos, is readily available, and the railway station is approximately 7 km away.
